case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JUAN ANTONIO TIPAZ DARDON

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF APR-26-2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, MATTER IS CONTINUED TO AUG-09-2019 AT 8:30 AM. IN DEPT. 506 NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TIPAZ DARDON, JUAN ANTONIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 SERVED AUG-14-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TIPAZ DARDON, JUAN ANTONIO

IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOSEFINA FLORES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER CONTINUED TO APRIL 26, 2019 AT 8:30AM FOR PROGRESS REPORT.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
